ground_truth.title: US News MBA Rankings: Full & Part Time Programs
ground_truth.main_content:
MBA ranking reports in aggregate can help an applicant to see trends around MBA program brand and prioritize their reach versus reasonable program options. US News & World Report has been the ranking king and so we present its data here.

The 2023-2024 US News ranking data for the top 20 full-time MBA programs can be found in the chart below. See details and dates on application deadlines.

Ranking in 2023	Business School	Previous US News Ranking	International Students/ Women	Entering Fall 2022 Full-Time MBA Acceptance Rate	Entering Fall 2022 Full-Time MBA Enrolled Rate/Yield	Average GPA	Average GMAT Score	MBA Class of 2022 Median Starting Salary
1	Chicago Booth School of Business	1	37% / 40%	30%	48%	3.6	729	$175,000
2	Kellogg School of Management	3 (tie)	38% / 48%	31%	38%	3.7	729	$165,000
3	UPenn Wharton School	1 (tie)	35% / 50%	23%	62%	3.6	733	$175,000
4	MIT Sloan School of Management	5 (tie)	40% / 46%	15%	52%	3.6	730	$165,000
5	Harvard Business School	5	38% / 46%	14%	86%	3.7	727	$172,877
6 (tie)	Dartmouth Tuck School of Business	11	43% / 45%	33%	38%	3.5	726	$159,842
6 (tie)	Stanford Graduate School of Business	3 (tie)	37% / 44%	9%	80%	3.7	737	$182,272
8 (tie)	Michigan Ross School of Business	10	36% / 42%	28%	37%	3.5	720	$153,465
8 (tie)	Yale School of Management	7	48% / 43%	28%	39%	3.7	725	$152,744
10	NYU Stern School of Business	12 (tie)	44% / 45%	27%	34%	3.6	733	$161,475
11 (tie)	Columbia Business School	8 (tie)	51% / 44%	20%	57%	3.6	729	$162,099
11 (tie)	Duke Fuqua School of Business	12 (tie)	39% / 48%	21%	55%	3.1-3.9	680-760	$152,297
11 (tie)	Uc Berkeley Haas School of Business	8 (tie)	41% / 46%	20%	40%	3.6	729	$152,831
14	UVA Darden School of Business	14	43% / 37%	34%	34%	3.5	720	$157,090
15 (tie)	Cornell SC Johnson Graduate School of Management	15	43% / 39%	31%	38%	3.3	710	$155,048
15 (tie)	USC Marshall School of Business	19 (tie)	41% / 46%	25%	29%	3.5	708	$150,314
17	Emory Goizueta Business School	21	50% / 33%	37%	29%	3.3	700	$149,759
18	CMU Tepper School of Business	16	56% / 31%	29%	29%	3.3	702	$148,067
19	UCLA Anderson School of Management	17	44% / 35%	38%	35%	3.1-3.8	711	$146,727
20 (tie)	UT McCombs School of Business	18	28% / 35%	34%	35%	3.5	706	$144,564
